calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID N. LAKE, ESQ. of Law Offices of David N. Lake, Tel No. 818-788-5100 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Dar Najjar, Inc.;
Atty. MICHELLE L. LANDRY, ESQ. of Putterman Logan LLP, Tel No. 415-839-8779 appearing for Defendant JBear Associates, LLC.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JBEAR ASSOCIATES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to all three causes of action. All three causes of action alleged by plaintiff are premised on the assumption that defendant had some obligation to negotiate the terms of a new lease with a buyer or prospective buyer of the restaurant. Yet the parties' contract negates any such obligation. Plaintiff has not suggested that he can allege any new or different facts which would support a cognizable claim against defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
